_comment: Etherwarp Helper config - edit this file to customize your waypoints setup.
_howToUse: This file is valid JSON. Do not use // or /* */ comments. Use keys like _comment or _guide if you want to leave notes.
After editing this file, save it and run /iq reload. You do NOT need to restart the game.
Each category groups related waypoints that can be toggled together.
Each waypoint defines which phases it should appear in and which phases it should hide.
If you just want a normal full-block highlight, use shape: FULL or simply omit the shape field.
Use shape presets to highlight only parts of a block (top, slab, center, pillar, etc.).
This file already includes ready-to-copy templates for FULL, TOP, SLAB_UPPER, SLAB_LOWER and CENTER_PLATE.
Only use box when shape is CUSTOM. That is the advanced/enthusiast option.
Supported phases: SUPPLIES, BUILD, EATEN, STUN, DPS, SKIP, BOSS, COMPLETED

_shapePresets.PILLAR: Thin vertical pillar in the center

categoryFields.name: Category name. Used for organizing and toggling groups of waypoints.
categoryFields.enabled: Whether this category is active. true or false.
categoryFields.waypoints: List of waypoint objects in this category.

waypointFields.name: Waypoint name/description. Displayed in logs.
waypointFields.position: Legacy single position in [x, y, z]. Still supported.
waypointFields.positions: Multiple highlight positions in [[x, y, z], ...]. Use this for clusters.
waypointFields.color: Waypoint color as hex string (#RRGGBB) or RGB array [r, g, b]. Example: #FF0000 (red), [0, 255, 0] (green).
waypointFields.colors: Optional per-position colors. Order matches positions: positions[0] -> colors[0], positions[1] -> colors[1], etc. If shorter than positions, the last color is reused.
waypointFields.renderStyle: Render type: OUTLINE or SOLID. Default: OUTLINE.
waypointFields.lineWidth: Line thickness for OUTLINE style (0.5 - 4.0). Default: 2.0.
waypointFields.shape: Optional. Default is FULL. Presets: FULL, TOP, BOTTOM, SLAB_LOWER, SLAB_UPPER, HALF_LOWER, HALF_UPPER, CENTER_PLATE, EDGE_TOP, EDGE_BOTTOM, PILLAR, CUSTOM.
waypointFields.box: Advanced only. Use only with CUSTOM shape. Relative local box with min/max arrays. Example: {"min":[-0.5,0.5,-0.5],"max":[0.5,1.0,0.5]}.
waypointFields.showInPhases: Array of phases where this waypoint should appear. Example: ["EATEN", "STUN"].
waypointFields.hideInPhases: Array of phases where this waypoint should be hidden. Takes priority over showInPhases. Default: [].
waypointFields.maxRenderDistance: Maximum distance to render waypoint (-1 = unlimited). Default: -1.

waypoints.name: X Aim (X Cannon / Coal Left / Coal Right / Square)
X Block Highlights (X Cannon / Coal Left / Coal Right / Square)
Equals Aim (X Cannon / Coal / Shop Left / Shop Right)
Tri Aim (X Cannon / Coal / Shop Left / Shop Right)
